title: Manufacturing Engineer - Exide Industries Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Exide Industries Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Exide Industries Digital Technologies:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries Digital Technologies!
